all.en: All employees are required to complete the annual cybersecurity awareness training.
all.zh: 全體員工須完成年度資安意識訓練。

all.en: This training helps protect company data and customer information.
all.zh: 本訓練有助於保護公司資料與客戶資訊安全。

all.en: It is part of our ongoing commitment to information security best practices.
all.zh: 此為本公司持續推動資安最佳實務承諾的一環。

all.en: The course is available on the corporate learning platform starting March 1.
all.zh: 本課程自 3 月 1 日起於企業學習平台上線。

all.en: Employees must complete the training by March 31 at the latest.
all.zh: 員工最遲須於 3 月 31 日前完成訓練。

all.en: The full course takes approximately ninety minutes to complete.
all.zh: 完整課程約需九十分鐘完成。

all.en: It can be done in multiple sessions to fit your work schedule.
all.zh: 可分次進行，方便配合工作時程。

all.en: The training covers phishing emails, password hygiene, and safe browsing.
all.zh: 訓練內容涵蓋釣魚郵件、密碼管理與安全瀏覽。

all.en: It also explains how to handle suspicious links and unexpected attachments.
all.zh: 並說明如何處理可疑連結與非預期附件。

all.en: A new module on remote work security has been added this year.
all.zh: 今年新增遠端工作資安專屬單元。

all.en: Another new module focuses on protecting mobile devices.
all.zh: 另一新單元聚焦於行動裝置防護。

all.en: Short quizzes will appear after each section to reinforce key concepts.
all.zh: 每個單元結束後將安排簡短測驗以強化重點觀念。

all.en: A passing score of eighty percent is required to receive credit.
all.zh: 須達 80 分以上方可取得認證學分。

all.en: Employees may retake quizzes as many times as needed.
all.zh: 員工可視需要多次重複作答測驗。

all.en: Managers will receive a weekly progress report for their teams.
all.zh: 主管將每週收到所屬團隊的進度報告。

all.en: Completion of this training is mandatory for continued system access.
all.zh: 完成本訓練是維持系統使用權限的必要條件。

all.en: Employees who do not complete the training may temporarily lose network access.
all.zh: 未完成訓練者可能暫時失去網路使用權限。

all.en: If you suspect a phishing attempt, please forward the message to phish@company.com.
all.zh: 如懷疑遭遇釣魚攻擊，請將郵件轉寄至 phish@company.com。

all.en: Never share your password with anyone, including IT staff.
all.zh: 請勿將密碼提供給任何人，包括 IT 人員。

all.en: Always lock your computer when stepping away from your desk.
all.zh: 離開座位時務必鎖定您的電腦。

all.en: Use only company-approved software and cloud storage services.
all.zh: 僅可使用公司核准的軟體與雲端儲存服務。

all.en: Report any lost or stolen devices to the help desk immediately.
all.zh: 如遺失或遭竊任何裝置，請立即通報服務窗口。

all.en: Quarterly simulated phishing tests will continue throughout the year.
all.zh: 本年度將持續每季進行釣魚演練。

all.en: Thank you for helping us keep our organization safe and secure.
all.zh: 感謝您共同維護組織的安全與資訊保護。
